title: HarriAddons Gaming Suite
description: Harri's new & improved gaming suite for some chat and legit skyblock utilities, live and reloaded for fabric!
body:
Harri's Mod for some chat and legit Hypixel utilities!
Currently features:


**/hags to open gui to view all features!**
- Ability to register custom command shortcuts and quickly shorten commands via command shorteners! 
- Ability to add "proverbs" to automatically send words of wisdom when receiving a trigger! 
- Autokick players from Hypixel parties when detecting inappropriate language or your choice of blacklisted words! 
- Works with Hypixel and all your favorite servers! 
- Truncate (shorten) damage numbers for Hypixel Skyblock 
- Hypixel Skyblock M7 helpful features (pad timers, wither stuck alert, dragon hitboxes, etc) 
- Assorted solvers
- RNG drop logger
- GUI chat tool
- MUCH more planned!
